raw_text_preview:
. Home page smoke tests
Verify home page loads successfully with HTTP 200 status when opening https://www.acima.com/en.

Verify the Acima logo is displayed in the header and is visually clear.

Verify clicking the Acima logo from any inner page navigates back to the home page.

Verify the main hero section shows the heading “Shop with Acima Leasing” and the description about lease‑to‑own solutions.

Verify “Shop In-store” and “Shop Online” buttons are visible in the hero section.

Verify “Shop In-store” button navigates to the Find a Store page (/find-a-store).

Verify “Shop Online” button navigates to the Shop Online page (/shop-online).

Verify the page shows the “Shopping is easy” three‑step section (Select a retailer / Apply for a lease / Shop & checkout) with correct text.

Verify “Shop now” button in the “Shopping is easy” section navigates to the Marketplace (/marketplace).

2. Navigation menu tests
Verify the top navigation/menu is displayed with items: How It Works, Ways to Shop, For Retailers, For eCommerce Retailers, About Us, News, Support/FAQ, Careers, Invest, Blog, Accessibility, Solutions, Digital, Acima Benefits Plus, Acima Locations, Partner Locations, Upbound (or equivalent menu entry points depending on final layout).

Verify clicking “How It Works” navigates to /how-it-works and page content loads without errors.

Verify clicking “Ways to Shop” navigates to /ways-to-shop.

Verify clicking “For Retailers” navigates to /partner.

Verify clicking “For eCommerce Retailers” navigates to /ecommerce.

Verify clicking “About Us” navigates to /about-us.

Verify clicking “News” navigates to /news.

Verify clicking “Support/FAQ” opens the support/FAQ page (/aboutleasing).

Verify clicking “Careers” opens acimacareers.com in same or new tab as per requirement.

Verify clicking “Invest” opens investor.upbound.com successfully.

Verify clicking “Blog” navigates to /blog.

Verify “Accessibility” link navigates to /accessibility.

Verify “Acima Locations” navigates to locations.acima.com.

Verify “Partner Locations” navigates to /find-a-store.

Verify “Upbound” link navigates to upbound.com.

3. Marketplace and product‑discovery tests
Verify the “Acima Marketplace” section is visible on the home page with a description about getting the things you love without perfect credit.

Verify the “Start Shopping” button in the Marketplace section navigates to /marketplace.

Verify https://www.acima.com/en/marketplace page loads successfully and shows a list of partner retailers or a search/filter UI for stores.

Verify the “Select a retailer” step on marketplace allows searching or selecting from multiple retailers (e.g., list > click any retailer navigates to detail or external link).

4. Mobile app links tests
Verify the section “Do more in the Acima mobile app” is displayed on the home page.

Verify the text mentions shopping big names like Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart only in the app.

Verify “Download app from app store” link opens the Apple App Store URL for Acima Leasing.

Verify “Download app from google play store” link opens the correct Google Play Store page for Acima Leasing.

5. Social media and external links
Verify “Facebook” icon/link opens Acima’s Facebook page.

Verify “Instagram” icon/link opens Acima’s Instagram page.
